title: A SAWT LO IN INNAH CIAH DING

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lampi ah hong lungnuam sak ding la khat sa ni
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciang ding
Zan khua mial being ding in
Ni tang tawntungna sungah
A sawt lo in ah inn ah ciah ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A sawt lo-in ah a sawt lo-in ah
Tuipi hual in kantan ding
Eite kimu ding, huihpi nung a ven ciangin
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sep ding in muh peuh
Ih khutin ih sem ding hi
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding
Pasian hehpihna in
Ih tha hong khauh sak ding
A sawt lo-in inn ah ciah ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: a gim khe te ading lam
Ih maai sak ding hi
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding
Itna lungsim ki zel kim in
Hoihna lawh hen
a sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Lungkhamna pengin
Tawhdamna gal khatah om
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding
Tua khuapi nuam sungah
Khitui luanna om lo
A sawt lo-in ah inn ah ciah ding
